title: gymnanthemum scariosum
intro: Gymnanthemum scariosum, also known as the African sage or bush sage, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum scariosum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
